diagrams.title: Virtual Address Translation
diagrams.description: Shows how virtual address is translated to physical address using page table and TLB
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete address translation mechanism in virtual memory systems

diagrams.title: Page Fault Handling Flowchart
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing steps when a page fault occurs in demand paging
elements: Select victim page if no free frames
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the complete page fault handling process and understanding why page faults are expensive

diagrams.title: Thrashing Phenomenon
diagrams.description: Graph showing relationship between degree of multiprogramming, CPU utilization, and thrashing
diagrams.purpose: Understanding when thrashing occurs and how to prevent it by managing memory allocation
